transferredDatetime.description: The date and time the transfer was executed.

quantity.description: The number of warrant shares transferred.

resultingSecurityId.description: The identifier of the new warrant created as a result of the transfer.

resultingSecurityLabel.description: The human-readable label of the new warrant created as a result of the transfer (e.g. "W-8").

schema_def.description: A transfer transaction for a warrant. Represents the transfer of warrant shares to a new warrant.
